feed.title: No Crows Permitted
feed.subtitle: A website emphasizing the importance of NO CROWS!!!!

entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
This is my first post I’m going to make. It could also be my last. Life is a funny thing like that. I’m currently working on a project called Mail Thief where you’re a little gremlin stealing mail. It’s definitely a felony but I think it should be fun. I would like to make some short youtube videos discussing it to start building some buzz but also I don’t really care if the game does well. I have never made and shipped a game and this is my one opportunity to do that.

Other Felonies I have Committed

haha nice try cops. See you on the flippity flip.
entry.summary: This is my first post I’m going to make. It could also be my last. Life is a funny thing like that. I’m currently working on a project called Mail Thief where you’re a little gremlin stealing mail. It’s definitely a felony but I think it should be fun. I would like to make some short youtube videos discussing it to start building some buzz but also I don’t really care if the game does well. I have never made and shipped a game and this is my one opportunity to do that. Other Felonies I have Committed haha nice try cops. See you on the flippity flip.
